title: Values, Expressions, Names, and Types
description: Build a transparent unit and budget calculator whose intermediate values can be inspected and tested. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of an inspectable unit and budget calculator while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Reason about values, objects, names, identity, and mutability.
Use numeric, Boolean, None, and conversion operations without silent assumption errors.
Predict expression evaluation and assignment effects before execution.
